subcodes.first_line: This blessed Word shineth forth even as the sun from the horizon of the heaven of the divine Tablet; all must fix their gaze upon it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این کلمه مبارکه بمثابه آفتاب از افق سماء لوح الهی مشرقست باید کل باو ناظر باشند
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
